data.title: Spanish Police Dismantle Cryptocurrency Scam Using AI
data.description: According to PANews, Spanish authorities have arrested six individuals involved in a cryptocurrency investment scam that defrauded 208 victims of over 19 million euros (21.5 million dollars). The arrests followed a two-year investigation into the group, which used artificial intelligence to create realistic videos of celebrities promising substantial returns on crypto investments to lure potential investors. The suspects face charges of fraud, money laundering, and falsification of documents, with the investigation still ongoing.

data.title: SEC and Binance Request 60-Day Lawsuit Pause Amid Discussions
data.description:
SEC and Binance jointly seek to pause legal proceedings for 60 days, highlighting productive discussions involving the Crypto Task Force.
source: https://coincu.com/331670-sec-binance-lawsuit-pause-request

data.title: U.S. Customs: The tariff declaration system has failed and tariffs cannot be collected temporarily
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. Customs reported that the system used to exempt freight tariffs has malfunctioned. The affected freight includes all trade goods from countries that are now within the 90-day tariff suspension period implemented by the Trump administration.
U.S. Customs said it found that the entry code used by U.S. shippers to apply for duty-free goods could not be used and that "this issue is under review." For now, this means that the U.S. government cannot impose tariffs for the time being. U.S. Customs said it will release an update after the problem is resolved. (Jinshi)

data.title: The SEC and Binance have jointly applied to the court to suspend the lawsuit for 60 days
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Former FOX reporter Eleanor Terrett posted on X that the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and Binance have jointly applied to the court to suspend the lawsuit for another 60 days. According to a recent document, the two sides had "productive" talks, some of which were related to the work of the cryptocurrency task force, and said that continuing to suspend the lawsuit was in the best interests of all parties. The court previously required both parties to submit a joint status report by April 14, 2025, and the case will be updated again after 60 days.

data.title: Bitcoin Price at $84,000 and $96,000 Are Significant, Here’s Why
data.description:
The broader digital currency ecosystem is watching the next Bitcoin (BTC) price trend amid recent bullish shift in the top coin. The price of Bitcoin surged over $81,000 on April 9 after US President Donald Trump announced a 90-day pause in reciprocal tariffs.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/11/bitcoin-price-at-84000-and-96000-are-significant-heres-why/

data.title: Top US Crypto Exchange Coinbase Rolls Out Trading Support for Brand New Omni-Chain Native Token
data.description:
Coinbase traders can now buy and sell the brand-new native token of a new omni-chain tool focused on artificial intelligence (AI). The top US crypto exchange rolled out support for Wayfinder (PROMPT) on Thursday, the same day the token launched.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/11/top-us-crypto-exchange-coinbase-rolls-out-trading-support-for-brand-new-omni-chain-native-token/

data.title: Will a 90-day tariff pause ignite Bitcoin’s longest green run?
data.description:
Macro tailwinds are in play, but BTC’s uptrend now faces a critical test of strength.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/will-a-90-day-tariff-pause-ignite-bitcoins-longest-green-run/

data.title: Long-term holders continue to accumulate as short-term sellers react to market stress
data.description:
The sell-side risk ratio is a behavioral metric designed to assess the likelihood of Bitcoin holders selling their coins based on past accumulation and current market conditions. A low value suggests holders are unlikely to spend, while a high value indicates mounting incentives to realize gains or cut losses.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/long-term-holders-continue-to-accumulate-as-short-term-sellers-react-to-market-stress/

data.title: SEC and Binance seek court approval to extend case pause by 60 days
data.description:
The U. S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and Binance have jointly requested a 60-day pause in their ongoing legal battle, citing progress in settlement discussions. The change of gears could be attributed to the commission of the newly formed SEC Crypto Task Force, whose mandate is to harmonize securities laws for digital assets. 🚨NEW: The […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sec-and-binance-seek-court-approval/

data.title: Roundhill Investment Wants to Launch an ETF Focused on Humanoid Robots
data.description:
After launching Bitcoin and AI-themed ETF, Roundhill Investment aims to launch an ETF focused on companies developing humanoid robots.
source: https://decrypt.co/314567/roundhill-investment-wants-to-launch-an-etf-focused-on-humanoid-robots
